title: Plan the first week of an AI creator launch
objective: Produce a seven-day launch plan for an AI creator or AI VTuber that can be operated with local agents and minimal manual editing.
context: The goal is to get to audience reaction and monetization signals quickly, without overbuilding infrastructure first.
constraints: Include what to post on X, YouTube or short-form video, and note/Substack
Focus on speed, evidence, and repeatability
